name: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum
title: BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro Rum | Golden Aged Rum | BACARDÍ Global
short_description: A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour.
marketing_description: A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour. Use BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum to imbue your cocktails with a flair of sophistication.
tasting_notes: Enjoy notes of mild vanilla, toasted oak, clove and honey with a smooth finish.
how_to_serve: Use BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro rum to imbue your cocktails with a flair of sophistication.

faq_items.question: WHAT DOES AÑEJO MEAN?
faq_items.answer: Añejo comes from the Spanish word for ‘aged’.

faq_items.question: WHAT IS AGED RUM?
faq_items.answer: Rum can be aged anywhere from one year upwards. Aging rum can add additional complexity to its flavour and mouthfeel.

faq_items.question: HOW DO YOU MAKE RUM?
faq_items.answer: Rum is made using only three ingredients: molasses from sugarcane, yeast and water. Ingredients are fermented, then distilled, aged, filtered and blended.

raw_text_excerpt: BACARDÍ AÑEJO CUATRO A blend of rums aged for a minimum of four years under the Caribbean sun, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro 4 year old rum has a unique taste and a soft, golden colour. Tasting Notes Enjoy notes of mild vanilla, toasted oak, clove and honey with a smooth finish. Nose Vanilla and cinnamon Palate Dark honey and clove Finish Toffee and oak Cuatro means ‘four’, after the years the spirit has spent aging beneath the Caribbean sun.

source_metadata.description: With color like shimmering gold, BACARDÍ Añejo Cuatro delivers flavors smooth like honey, complemented by mild vanilla and toasted oak.
